incident_description: A driverless Cruise vehicle in San Francisco struck and dragged a pedestrian after a prior human-driven crash, prompting federal reporting enforcement.
notes: NHTSA press release + consent order; incident date is the crash date.

incident_description: A ChatGPT outage caused some users to see other users' chat titles and exposed limited payment information for some active Plus subscribers.
notes: Company postmortem + status incident.

incident_description: Italy's data protection authority ordered temporary limits on ChatGPT processing after finding privacy-law concerns with the service.
notes: Regulator order + regulator follow-up.

incident_description: The FTC charged Rite Aid over AI facial recognition surveillance that allegedly generated false shoplifting matches and harmed customers.
notes: FTC press release + FTC case page with complaint and order.

incident_description: iTutorGroup settled EEOC claims that its hiring software automatically rejected older tutor applicants.
notes: EEOC filing statement + federal docket; incident anchored to 2023 settlement development.

incident_description: A class action alleged UnitedHealthcare and naviHealth used the nH Predict algorithm to deny post-acute care coverage to Medicare Advantage patients.
notes: Court complaint + federal docket; allegations contested.

incident_description: A class action alleged Cigna used the PxDx system to deny health claims in bulk without individualized medical review.
notes: Federal docket + amended complaint; Cigna disputes AI characterization.

incident_description: An apparently AI-generated fake image of an explosion near the Pentagon spread online and briefly affected market sentiment before officials debunked it.
notes: Official emergency statement + original fact-check with primary verification; creator unknown.

incident_description: Stanford researchers reported that LAION-5B contained links to suspected or confirmed child sexual abuse material used in AI training-data pipelines.
notes: Stanford report + LAION response; date follows LAION's stated notification date.

incident_description: Attorneys in Mata v. Avianca were sanctioned after submitting fake case citations generated by ChatGPT in federal court filings.
notes: Sanctions opinion + docket; incident date is sanction order date.
